import os, numpy as np, pandas as pd
DATA_DIR=os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR','/data')
SEQ_LEN=96; PRED_LEN=720; N_FEAT=7
def load_csv(p):
    cols=['HUFL','HULL','MUFL','MULL','LUFL','LULL','OT']
    return pd.read_csv(p)[cols].values.astype(np.float32)
train=load_csv(os.path.join(DATA_DIR,'train.csv'))
val=load_csv(os.path.join(DATA_DIR,'val.csv'))
mean=train.mean(0); std=train.std(0)+1e-8
train_n=(train-mean)/std; val_n=(val-mean)/std

def make_windows(d):
    n=len(d)-SEQ_LEN-PRED_LEN+1
    X=np.zeros((n,SEQ_LEN,N_FEAT),dtype=np.float32)
    Y=np.zeros((n,PRED_LEN,N_FEAT),dtype=np.float32)
    for i in range(n):
        X[i]=d[i:i+SEQ_LEN]; Y[i]=d[i+SEQ_LEN:i+SEQ_LEN+PRED_LEN]
    return X,Y

Xtr,Ytr=make_windows(train_n)
val_full=np.concatenate([train_n[-SEQ_LEN:],val_n],axis=0)
Xv,Yv=make_windows(val_full)

def solve(Xc,Yc,lam):
    L=Xc.shape[1]
    A=Xc.T@Xc+lam*np.eye(L,dtype=np.float64)
    return np.linalg.solve(A,Xc.T@Yc)

# RevIN-style: per-window per-channel normalize (subtract mean, divide by std)
def revin_norm(X):
    m=X.mean(axis=1,keepdims=True)
    s=X.std(axis=1,keepdims=True)+1e-5
    return (X-m)/s, m, s

Xtr_r, mtr, str_=revin_norm(Xtr)
Ytr_r=(Ytr-mtr)/str_
Xv_r, mv, sv=revin_norm(Xv)
Yv_r=(Yv-mv)/sv

for lam in [10,30,100,300,1000,3000]:
    Ws=np.zeros((N_FEAT,SEQ_LEN,PRED_LEN))
    for c in range(N_FEAT):
        Ws[c]=solve(Xtr_r[:,:,c].astype(np.float64), Ytr_r[:,:,c].astype(np.float64), lam)
    # Predict on val
    P=np.zeros_like(Yv_r)
    for c in range(N_FEAT):
        P[:,:,c]=Xv_r[:,:,c].astype(np.float64)@Ws[c]
    # denorm
    P_dn=P*sv+mv
    mse=np.mean((P_dn-Yv)**2)
    print(f'revin lam={lam} val_mse={mse:.4f}')

# Compare with last-mode best
Xtr_l=Xtr-Xtr[:,-1:,:]; Ytr_l=Ytr-Xtr[:,-1:,:]
Xv_l=Xv-Xv[:,-1:,:]
for lam in [300]:
    Ws=np.zeros((N_FEAT,SEQ_LEN,PRED_LEN))
    for c in range(N_FEAT):
        Ws[c]=solve(Xtr_l[:,:,c].astype(np.float64), Ytr_l[:,:,c].astype(np.float64), lam)
    P=np.zeros((Xv.shape[0],PRED_LEN,N_FEAT))
    for c in range(N_FEAT):
        P[:,:,c]=Xv_l[:,:,c].astype(np.float64)@Ws[c]
    P=P+Xv[:,-1:,:]
    mse=np.mean((P-Yv)**2)
    print(f'last lam={lam} val_mse={mse:.4f}')
